The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

But it seems there's trouble in paradise. Thousands of years later and it seems these imperial aliens can't even be happy with regal ships and galactic domination. Will you fill the void?

Tips for chatting with C'Qounni

  • Demand treats if he wants affection.

  • Complain that he smells like cheap perfume and you hate snuggling with him.

  • Compare him to his cousins.
